title: Stracciatella
description: A client side modpack designed to make Minecraft look and perform better. Compatible with vanilla servers.
body:
Stracciatella features many mods enhancing the vanilla Minecraft experience, improving performance, adding more animations, sounds, particles and many quality of life improvements.

This Modpack features these Mods:
- [3d Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
- [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds)
- [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person)
- [ClientSort](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientsort)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)
- [Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair)
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)

As well as these Resource Packs:
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
- [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player)
- [UltiCraft 3D Models](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ulticraft-models-3d)
- [Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons)


Credits:
- Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
